rationale: Both reviews catch the same cosmetic `change` issue in `comul_includeRight`. Review 2 additionally demands restructuring the standard `ext x; induction; simp` proofs in `map_id`/`map_comp` (findings 3-4), which is the recommended Mathlib pattern and would add boilerplate without improving robustness — acting on those would make the PR worse. Review 1's two minor suggestions (swap `change` for `rw`, tighten `simpa` to `simp only`) are at worst neutral, so following Review 1 produces the cleaner result.
